components.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-6 sm:p-8
components.input: px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-{primary} focus:border-transparent
components.button_primary: px-6 py-2 bg-{primary} text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-{primary_hover} transition disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
components.button_secondary: px-4 py-2 bg-{secondary} text-{text} rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 transition
components.filter_tab_active: px-3 py-1.5 text-sm rounded-md bg-{primary} text-white transition
components.filter_tab_inactive: px-3 py-1.5 text-sm rounded-md text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 transition
components.list_item: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-gray-100

rationale: minimal mono-tone (blue + neutral grays) keeps focus on content; rounded-2xl + shadow-sm gives a soft modern feel without chrome.
